metadata.notes: Data current through 2026 NBA Trade Deadline (Feb 5, 2026). Years 2027-2032 reflect known traded picks as of that date. Protection details sourced from Hoops Rumors and cross-referenced with trade deadline recap.

picks.swapCondition: ATL receives MORE FAVORABLE of their own pick vs SAS pick (swap rights traded to SAS). See complex scenario below.
picks.notes: Part of Spurs/Hawks/Jazz/Timberwolves/Cavaliers swap scenario. SAS receives most favorable of SAS or ATL pick. ATL receives most favorable of: (i) less favorable of ATL and SAS, and (ii) less favorable of CLE and the more favorable of UTH(if top-8)/MIN.
ATL receives MORE FAVORABLE of MIL 2026 1st and NOP 2026 1st. MIL receives less favorable. (ATL-NOP trade 6/25/2025; DEN-MIL-NOP-OKC trade 11/23/2020 chain)

ATL receives LESS FAVORABLE of ATL/LAC 2026 2nd round picks. Part of Celtics/Pacers/Hawks/Heat/Clippers/Spurs distribution: Grizzlies get most favorable of LAC or best of BOS/IND/MIA; Nets and Nuggets split remaining; Spurs and Timberwolves from remaining pool. ATL gets least favorable of BOS 2nd and most favorable of IND/MIA 2nds.
ATL receives SAS 2027 1st round pick. Part of ATL-SAS swap arrangement for 2026; SAS conveys 2027 pick to ATL.

ATL's own 2027 2nd — previously traded to POR in Hawks-Trail Blazers trade (Feb 1, 2026 Vit Krejci deal), then ATL reacquired it back in same trade. ATL receives: Hawks' 2027 2nd (returned), Knicks' 2030 2nd.

picks.swapCondition: ATL has swap rights: more favorable of ATL and (less favorable of CLE and UTA); other goes to CLE.
picks.notes: Complex swap arrangement involving ATL, CLE, UTA for 2028 1st round pick.
ATL retains own 2029 1st.

picks.swapCondition: More favorable of ATL and MIA 2029 2nd goes to one team; other goes to OKC. (Thunder-Hornets trade context: Hawks/Heat 2029 2nd most favorable to CHA via OKC trade.)
picks.notes: OKC traded most favorable of Hawks/Heat 2029 2nd to Hornets in Thunder-Hornets Dieng deal (Feb 4, 2026). ATL 2029 2nd involved in that pool.
ATL retains own 2030 1st.
ATL receives NYK 2030 2nd round pick via Hawks-Trail Blazers trade (Feb 1, 2026). POR originally received this pick then sent to ATL.
ATL retains own 2031 1st.
ATL own 2031 2nd or swap for HOU 2031 2nd (31-55 range).
ATL retains own 2032 1st.
ATL receives LAL 2032 2nd round pick via Lakers-Hawks trade (Feb 5, 2026 Luke Kennard deal). Hawks received Gabe Vincent + LAL 2032 2nd.
BOS retains own 2026 1st round pick.
BOS receives MOST FAVORABLE of DET/MIL/ORL 2026 2nd round picks. Magic receives 2nd-most favorable; Pelicans receive least favorable.
BOS retains own 2027 1st.
BOS receives DEN 2027 2nd round pick via Celtics-Bulls trade (Feb 5, 2026 Anfernee Simons deal). Celtics acquired Vucevic + DEN 2027 2nd.

picks.swapCondition: SAS can swap 2-30 with BOS. If SAS pick is in positions 2-30, San Antonio has right to swap with Boston.
picks.notes: BOS retains own 2028 1st. SAS has swap right on this pick (positions 2-30).
BOS receives NYK 2028 2nd if it lands in picks 46-60.
BOS 2029 1st traded to POR. Part of: most and least favorable of BOS/MIL/POR goes to POR, then other goes to WAS.
BOS receives OKC 2029 2nd round pick.
BOS retains own 2030 1st.
BOS receives BKN 2030 2nd (via HOU).

BOS receives CHA 2030 2nd (top-55 protected) via Celtics-Hornets Xavier Tillman trade (Feb 5, 2026). Celtics acquired CHA 2030 2nd top-55 protected — meaning BOS only receives if it falls picks 56-60.
BOS retains own 2031 1st.

picks.swapCondition: BOS holds lesser of own/CLE 2031 2nd (CLE 2031 2nd goes to UTA). Also holds HOU conditional pick (31-55) or swap option.
picks.notes: Complex 2031 2nd arrangement. BOS retains own or CLE pick (whichever less favorable to CLE-UTA deal).
BOS retains own 2032 1st.
BKN retains own 2026 1st round pick.
BKN 2026 2nd traded to Heat (top-55 protected). If pick lands top-55, BKN keeps it and obligation to MIA is extinguished.
BKN receives from Celtics/Pacers/Hawks/Heat/Clippers/Spurs 2026 2nd distribution. Nets receive pick from remaining pool after Grizzlies take most favorable.

picks.swapCondition: HOU holds swap right: HOU can swap own 2027 1st for BKN's 2027 1st if BKN pick is more favorable.
picks.notes: HOU-BKN trade (6/26/2024). Houston controls swap right — if BKN 2027 1st is more favorable than HOU's own, HOU can swap.
BKN receives NYK 2027 1st round pick.
BKN 2027 2nd goes to POR (via trade chain).

picks.swapCondition: NYK has swap right with BKN 2028 1st.
picks.notes: BKN 2028 1st: Two most favorable picks from BKN/PHI(9-30 if PHI conveys 1st to OKC by 2026)/PHX. PHI conveys 1-8 to OKC if applicable. BKN retains best picks in pool.
BKN receives NYK 2028 2nd if it falls in picks 46-60 (via ORL to PHX to BKN chain).
BKN retains own 2029 1st.
BKN receives LEAST FAVORABLE of DAL/HOU/PHX 2029 1st pool. HOU gets 2 most favorable of the three.
BKN retains own 2030 1st.
BKN retains own 2031 1st.
BKN retains own 2032 1st.
BKN receives DEN 2032 1st round pick (Nuggets-Nets Hunter Tyson trade, Feb 5, 2026).
BKN receives DEN 2032 2nd round pick (Nuggets-Nets Hunter Tyson trade, Feb 5, 2026). Nets acquired Hunter Tyson + DEN 2032 2nd.
BKN receives TOR 2032 2nd round pick via Raptors-Nets-Clippers three-team Chris Paul trade (Feb 5, 2026). Nets acquired Ochai Agbaji + TOR 2032 2nd + cash.
CHA retains own 2026 1st. CHA receives LEAST FAVORABLE pick in Wizards/Suns/Magic/Grizzlies/Hornets scenario — the least favorable of MEM own, ORL, and least favorable of WAS(top-8)/PHX.
CHA 2026 2nd: Kings receive if it lands 31-55; Pistons receive if it lands 56-60. Obligation to non-receiving team extinguished.
CHA retains own 2027 1st.
CHA receives LEAST FAVORABLE of ORL/BOS 2027 2nds via Hornets-Magic Tyus Jones trade (Feb 4, 2026). Hornets received Jones + least favorable of Magic's or Celtics' 2027 2nd.
CHA retains own 2028 1st.
CHA receives ORL 2028 2nd round pick via Hornets-Magic Tyus Jones trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHA retains own 2029 1st.
CHA receives MOST FAVORABLE of ATL/MIA 2029 2nd picks via Thunder-Hornets Ousmane Dieng trade (Feb 4, 2026). OKC traded most favorable of Hawks/Heat 2029 2nd to CHA.
CHA retains own 2030 1st.
CHA 2030 2nd traded to BOS (top-55 protected) via Celtics-Hornets Xavier Tillman trade (Feb 5, 2026). BOS only receives if pick falls 56-60.
CHA retains own 2031 1st.
CHA retains own 2032 1st.
CHI receives POR 2026 1st (top-14 protected). If pick lands top-14, Trail Blazers owe Bulls POR 2027 1st (top-14 protected instead). CHI-POR trade.

CHI receives MOST FAVORABLE of NYK/MIN/POR/NOP 2026 2nd round picks. Knicks receive least favorable of NYK/MIN; Spurs receive least favorable of POR/NOP; Wizards receive second-least of the four. (Knicks/Timberwolves/Trail Blazers/Pelicans distribution)

CHI receives LEAST FAVORABLE of DEN/GSW 2026 2nd picks via Bulls-Timberwolves Ayo Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026). Bulls acquired Rob Dillingham + Leonard Miller + least favorable DEN/GSW 2026 2nd + CLE 2027 2nd + most favorable MIN/GSW 2031 + most favorable PHX/HOU 2032 2nd.

CHI receives most favorable of POR/NOP 2026 2nd (part of NYK/MIN/POR/NOP pool where CHI gets overall most favorable). See also Celtics-Bulls Simons trade: Bulls receive most favorable of POR/NOP/MIN/NYK 2026 2nd.
If POR 2026 1st (top-14 protected) is NOT conveyed, POR owes CHI their 2027 1st (top-14 protected) instead.

CHI receives DEN 2027 2nd via three-team Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls trade (Feb 1, 2026 Ellis/Schröder deal). Bulls acquired Dario Saric + DEN 2027 2nd (from Cavaliers) + least favorable DET/MIL/NYK 2029 2nd (from Kings).
CHI receives CLE 2027 2nd round pick via Bulls-Timberwolves Ayo Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHI 2027 2nd traded to Mavericks via Mavericks-Wizards-Hornets Anthony Davis/Khris Middleton three-team trade (Feb 5, 2026). DAL received CHI 2027 2nd among other assets.
CHI retains own 2028 1st.
CHI retains own 2029 1st.
CHI receives LEAST FAVORABLE of DET/MIL/NYK 2029 2nd picks via three-team Cavaliers-Kings-Bulls trade (Feb 1, 2026). Kings sent least favorable of those three to Bulls.
CHI retains own 2030 1st.
CHI retains own 2031 1st.
CHI receives DEN 2031 2nd round pick via Bulls-Hornets Coby White trade (Feb 4, 2026). Bulls acquired Collin Sexton + Ousmane Dieng + DEN 2031 2nd + NYK 2031 2nd.
CHI receives NYK 2031 2nd round pick via Bulls-Hornets Coby White trade (Feb 4, 2026).
CHI receives MOST FAVORABLE of MIN/GSW 2031 picks via Bulls-Timberwolves Ayo Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
CHI retains own 2032 1st.
CHI receives MOST FAVORABLE of PHX/HOU 2032 2nd picks via Bulls-Timberwolves Ayo Dosunmu trade (Feb 5, 2026).
Top-4 protected for HOU. If HOU finishes #5-30 → pick enters OKC/LAC/HOU pool: OKC gets most favorable, PHI gets 2nd-most (via McCain trade 02/05/2026), WAS gets least favorable.
Houston's own 2026 2nd round pick. Unprotected.
CHI 2026 2nd round pick via Washington (Cam Whitmore trade, HOU–WAS–NOP 6/26/2025).
WAS 2026 2nd round pick (Cam Whitmore trade, HOU–WAS–NOP 6/26/2025).
Houston's own 2027 1st round pick. HOU also holds swap right with BKN — if BKN's 2027 1st is more favorable, HOU can swap. HOU–BKN trade 6/26/2024.
PHX 2027 1st (unprotected, via BKN — KD/Harden trade chain). HOU–BKN trade 6/26/2024.

picks.swapCondition: HOU can swap their own 2027 1st for BKN's 2027 1st if BKN pick is more favorable.
picks.notes: HOU holds swap right — if BKN 2027 1st is more favorable than HOU's own, HOU can swap. HOU–BKN trade 6/26/2024.
Houston's own 2028 1st round pick. Unprotected.
HOU receives 2 MOST favorable of HOU/DAL/PHX 2029 1sts. BKN receives least favorable of the three. BKN–HOU trade 6/26/2024.
DAL 2029 1st in HOU/DAL/PHX pool. HOU gets 2 most favorable; BKN gets worst. BKN–HOU trade 6/26/2024.
PHX 2029 1st in HOU/DAL/PHX pool. HOU gets 2 most favorable; BKN gets worst. BKN–HOU trade 6/26/2024.
SAC 2029 2nd round pick via Cam Whitmore trade. Conditional — verify specifics on RealGM.
WAS 2029 2nd round pick (Cam Whitmore trade). Unprotected.
Houston's own 2030 1st round pick. Unprotected.
Houston's own 2031 1st round pick. Unprotected.
OKC own 2026 1st enters the 3-pick pool (OKC/LAC/HOU). Least favorable of the three goes to WAS. OKC receives most favorable; PHI receives 2nd-most via McCain trade 02/05/2026.
LAC 2026 1st (Paul George trade) enters pool. OKC gets most favorable of OKC/LAC/HOU pool. PHI gets 2nd-most (McCain trade 02/05/2026). WAS gets least.
PHI 2026 1st (top-4 protected 2026 and 2027). If not conveyed by 2027, becomes PHI 2027 2nd round pick. OKC–PHI trade 9/2/2022.
UTA 2026 1st (top-8 protected). Obligation extinguishes entirely if not conveyed — no rollover. OKC–UTA trade 7/7/2021.
OKC gets most favorable of OKC/DAL/PHI 2nd round picks. HOU gets 2nd-most; SAS gets least.

picks.swapCondition: OKC has swap right with LAC 2027 1st — can swap more favorable of OKC own / DEN (positions 6-30) for LAC 2027 1st. OKC–LAC trade 2/5/2026.
picks.notes: OKC own 2027 1st. OKC also has swap right with LAC using more favorable of OKC/DEN(6-30).
DEN 2027 1st (top-5 protected). Conveys only 2+ years after DEN conveys a 1st to ORL. If never conveyed, becomes DEN 2029 2nd. OKC–DEN trade 9/9/2023.
SAS 2027 1st (top-16 protected, via SAC). Acquired at 2025 draft. Rolls forward if not conveyed. OKC–SAC–SAS trade 6/25/2025.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap more favorable of OKC own / DEN (6-30) for LAC 2027 1st. OKC–LAC trade 2/5/2026.
picks.notes: OKC holds swap right on LAC 2027 1st — can use more favorable of OKC own pick or DEN pick (if DEN finishes 6-30). OKC–LAC trade 2/5/2026.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap own 2028 1st for DAL 2028 1st if DAL pick is more favorable. OKC–DAL trade 2/8/2024.
picks.notes: OKC own 2028 1st. OKC also holds DAL 2028 swap right.

picks.swapCondition: OKC can swap own 2028 1st for DAL 2028 1st if DAL pick is more favorable. OKC–DAL trade 2/8/2024.
picks.notes: OKC can swap own 2028 1st for DAL 2028 1st if DAL pick is more favorable. OKC–DAL trade 2/8/2024.
OKC own 2029 1st. Unprotected.
DEN 2029 1st (top-5 protected). Conveys only if and 2+ years after DEN conveys a 1st to OKC. Conditional timing. OKC–DEN trade 9/9/2023.
OKC own 2030 1st. Unprotected.
OKC own 2031 1st. Unprotected.
OKC own 2032 1st. Unprotected.
